title: agrostemma githago var. linicola
intro: Agrostemma githago var. linicola, also known as a variant of the corn cockle plant, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and relieving inflammation. The health benefits of Agrostemma githago var. linicola are attributed to its anthelmintic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
